prompt: Generate a screenshot of a desktop for a Linux-based OS using the background from the first image and cute desktop icons from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a Linux desktop interface. The background should be the low-poly purple jellyfish wallpaper from image 1. The desktop should be populated with cute, pink-themed outline icons, similar in style and design to those shown in image 2, arranged on the left side of the screen.
objects: Icons arranged on the left side of the screen
